reminders.title: Research CA telehealth regs
reminders.description: Look into California telehealth regulations for dental. Dental Board requirements, HIPAA rules for virtual consults, state licensing.

reminders.title: Follow up with David H.
reminders.description: Email David Huang at SBDC. Ask about dental-specific telehealth regs and SBA loan eligibility with existing student debt.

reminders.title: Review teledent financials
reminders.description: Go through financial projections in TeleDent Research Airtable. Double check startup cost assumptions and break-even math.

reminders.title: Update competitor table
reminders.description: Update competitor analysis in Airtable. Check for new entrants, refresh pricing info, finalize notes.

reminders.title: Call Lexus re: check engine light
reminders.description: Check engine light came on during commute home. Call Lexus of Sacramento service department to schedule.

reminders.title: Confirm Kru reservation
reminders.description: Call Kru to confirm private dining room reservation for April 11. 8 guests, 7pm.

reminders.title: Gather tax documents for Linda
reminders.description: Pull together W-2s, 1099s, Dentrix P&L, practice expense tracker, daycare statement. Send to Linda at Nakamura CPA by March 20.

reminders.title: Pick up Lexus from service
reminders.description: Lexus ready at 10 AM. Return loaner. Lexus of Sacramento, 2740 Fulton Ave.

reminders.title: Start tomato seedlings indoors
reminders.description: Seeds arrived from Burpee. Start tomato and pepper seedlings in seed starting kit on kitchen windowsill. Keep soil moist, 70-80F.

reminders.title: Text Jenna + Mika re: flights
reminders.description: Check in with Jenna Kim and Mika about flight bookings for the surprise. Need arrival times so I can coordinate the airport pickup with Carson.

reminders.title: Transfer $3k from savings to checking
reminders.description: Move $3,000 from Golden 1 savings to checking for party expenses and upcoming bills. Do the transfer in online banking tonight.

reminders.title: Buy card and flowers for Soomin
reminders.description: Get a birthday card and flowers before the party tomorrow.

reminders.title: Pick up mochi cake from Mahoroba
reminders.description: Pick up custom mochi cake at 3 PM. Mahoroba Bakery, 1710 S Street.

reminders.title: Confirm tax returns filed before deadline
reminders.description: April 15 deadline tomorrow. Check with Linda that both personal and practice returns were e-filed.

reminders.title: Transplant seedlings to raised bed
reminders.description: Seedlings should be 6-8 inches tall. Move tomatoes, peppers, and basil to the raised bed out back.

reminders.title: Water garden
reminders.description: Water the raised bed garden. Every other day, morning before work.

reminders.title: Drop off donation bags at Goodwill
reminders.description: Drop off 3 bags of donations from spring cleaning. Hana's old clothes, old textbooks, unused kitchen stuff.

reminders.title: Order from Mike's Camera
reminders.description: Place order for Sony A7C II with 28-60mm kit at Mike's Camera. Ask for Ray.

reminders.title: Plan Mother's Day
reminders.description: Make brunch reservation + order flowers for Mom. Check Canon for brunch. 1-800-Flowers for delivery to Mom on May 10.

reminders.title: Order camera bag + SD card - Amazon
reminders.description: Order camera bag and extra SD card from Amazon for Soomin's anniversary gift.

reminders.title: Confirm Thursday rehearsal and Saturday call time with Margaret
reminders.description: Text Margaret to confirm Thursday dress rehearsal time and Saturday concert call time. Ask about parking near the church for guests.

reminders.title: Schedule Zoom with David H. — projections review
reminders.description: Set up 30-min Zoom with David Huang to walk through the updated financial projections and discuss SBA loan timeline.

reminders.title: Pick up camera from Mike's Camera
reminders.description: Pick up Sony A7C II order #MC-39847 from Mike's Camera. 2200 J Street. Bring photo ID.

reminders.title: Card + wrap gift tonight
reminders.description: Get anniversary card and wrap the camera before tomorrow.

reminders.title: 📊 End-of-Month Financial Review
reminders.description: Monthly review — compare actuals to targets: SPENDING TARGETS: • Groceries: 25 • Dining: 50 (⚠️ biggest risk area) • Gas: 30 • Coffee: 0 • Shopping: 5 • Entertainment/gifts: 0 • Total variable target: ,095 SAVINGS TARGETS: • Roth IRA: 83 total this month? • Savings account: 00 deposited? • Sinking fund: 00+ accumulated? CHECK: • CC balance — trending down toward sh? • Emergency fund — growing back toward 7K? • Any surprise expenses coming next month? PHASE 1 GOAL (through Sept): Clear CC balance, rebuild emergency fund to 5,600.

reminders.title: 💰 Monthly Budget Check — 1st Paycheck
reminders.description: Payday! Automate transfers before spending: ✅ 92 → Roth IRA (Vanguard) ✅ 50 → Savings (Golden 1) ✅ Pay fixed bills (rent ,650, childcare ,450, insurance 20) Then check: CC balance — is it under control? Dining so far this month — staying under 50? Any big purchases planned? If yes, check sinking fund balance first.

reminders.title: Monthly Budget Check - 1st Paycheck
reminders.description: Payday transfers: 292 to Roth IRA, 250 to Savings. Pay rent 2650, childcare 1450, insurance 520. Check CC balance and dining spend.

reminders.title: Budget Check - 1st Paycheck
reminders.description: Transfer 292 to Roth IRA and 250 to Savings

reminders.title: 1st Paycheck - Transfer 292 Roth + 250 Savings
reminders.description: Payday! Before spending: 1) Transfer 292 to Roth IRA (Vanguard). 2) Transfer 250 to Savings (Golden 1). 3) Pay fixed bills: rent 2650, childcare 1450, insurance 520. 4) Check CC balance. 5) Check dining spend so far this month - target 250 max.

reminders.title: 2nd Paycheck - Transfer 291 Roth + 250 Savings
reminders.description: Second paycheck! 1) Transfer 291 to Roth IRA (Vanguard). 2) Transfer 250 to Savings (Golden 1). 3) Pay Nelnet 1750. 4) Mid-month check: dining budget 250 - how much left? Shopping - anything big? Check sinking fund. CC payment 1800 due on 25th - enough in checking?

reminders.title: 💰 Monthly Budget Check — 2nd Paycheck
reminders.description: Second paycheck! Automate transfers: ✅ 91 → Roth IRA (Vanguard) ✅ 50 → Savings (Golden 1) ✅ Pay Nelnet student loan (,750) ✅ Review mid-month spending: Dining budget (50/mo) — how much left? Coffee — should be around 4 visits (5) so far. Shopping — anything big? Check sinking fund. CC payment (,800) due on the 25th — enough in checking?

reminders.title: Review savings-plan-final.md — 1 month check-in
reminders.description: One month since creating the financial plan. Check: 1) Did you switch Netflix and Spotify? 2) Did you shop auto insurance? 3) Did Roth increase to 583/mo? 4) Did savings auto-transfers start (250 on 1st + 250 on 15th)? 5) Run bash budget-check.sh 2026-06. 6) How is dining tracking vs 350 target? Open savings-plan-final.md for the full plan.

reminders.title: End of Month Financial Review
reminders.description: Monthly review vs targets: Groceries 525, Dining 250, Gas 130, Coffee 50, Shopping 75, Entertainment 50. Total variable target 1095. Did Roth get 583 total? Savings get 500? CC balance trending to zero? Emergency fund growing toward 27K? Any surprise expenses next month?
